Bus Timings

Ajman to Fujairah Bus Timings 2024 (The Best Options)

June 14, 2025
By Al Khaleej
Install
★★★★★ 5.0
Google Play Official App
UAE Bus Timing

Travel across the UAE with confidence. No confusion. No wasted time.

Do you confused when you want to make a trip from Ajman to Fujairah?

One of the best options is by using Bus. There are several bus routes that serve the trips from Ajman to Fujairah, some of them is 116 bus route and E700 bus route.

Traveling from Ajman to Fujairah offers a scenic and convenient journey, with multiple options to suit your schedule and preferences. Whether you’re a daily commuter or an explorer, the bus services available ensure a comfortable and affordable ride. Contents

Bus Routes

As above explanation, there are several bus routes that serve from Ajman to Fujairah, 116 bus route and e700 bus route. And here are the details.

E700 Bus Route

This is a popular choice for travelers from Ajman to Fujairah. The E700 bus operates daily, starting from Union Square Bus Station in Dubai and making several stops before reaching Fujairah.

The service runs from 6:35 AM to 9:35 PM on weekdays and Saturdays, with extended hours on Thursdays and Fridays?. The journey covers about 128 kilometers and typically takes around 1 hour and 47 minutes. The bus fare for a one-way ticket is approximately AED 25??.

116 Bus Route

Another option is the 116 bus route from Sharjah to Fujairah, which also serves passengers from Ajman. This route starts from Jubail Station in Sharjah, with buses departing every 30 minutes from 5:30 AM until 11:00 PM. The total travel time is about 2 hours, and the fare is AED 28

The E700 route includes the following key stops

Recommended Guides

Enhance your daily commute with these essential transport guides:

Complete RTA Intercity Routes Guide Largest Bus Stations Infrastructure in UAE
  • Union Square Bus Station
  • DNATA
  • Airport Terminal 1 External Parking
  • Sharjah Cement Factory
  • Dhaid Post Office
  • Dhaid Central Region Department
  • Thoban Enoc Petrol Station
  • Masafi Friday Market
  • Masafi Police Station
  • Fujairah, Ajman University

  • Fujairah Bus Station, among others?.

  • Jubail Station
  • Sharjah International Airport
  • Sharjah Desert Park
  • Al Dhaid
  • Masafi Park
  • Fujairah Corniche
  • Khorfakkan Bus Station?

Ajman to Fujairah Bus Timings

The E700 bus operates with a frequency of every 60 minutes on most days, with slight variations on Thursdays and Fridays to accommodate higher weekend travel demands. The first bus departs at 6:35 AM, and the last bus leaves at 9:35 PM on weekdays??.

For the 116 route, buses run every 30 minutes starting from 5:30 AM until the last bus at 11:00 PM. This frequent service ensures you can travel conveniently throughout the day?.## Conclusion

Traveling by bus from Ajman to Fujairah is not only economical but also offers a hassle-free and relaxing journey.

Whether you choose the E700 or the 116 route, you’ll find reliable services that cater to your schedule and comfort needs. And knowing the Ajman to Fujairah bus timing will help you to save your time when you want to go to the bus station.

Official UAE Sources

For the latest schedules, fares, and policy updates, verify with these primary sources:

  • RTA Journey Planner
  • RTA Intercity Timetable Reference (E100)
  • Abu Dhabi Mobility
  • Sharjah Roads and Transport Authority (SRTA)

Editorial review date: June 14, 2025.
